Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Trackless Sea]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 22''' — The Trackless Sea has beaches with walking sharks.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — The Trackless Sea is a location that requires a three-day journey to reach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — The Trackless Sea is a location mentioned by Naru Saeya.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — The Sage of the Silver Heart is on an island in the Trackless Sea.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — Attacks from the Trackless Sea in the north have intensified.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is flying into the Trackless Sea.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Natarianath protected her kingdom from the Trackless Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Trackless Sea is located in the far north of the Ashwind continent.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon drifts over the Trackless Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon intends to fight the Dreadgod over the Trackless Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — The Trackless Sea is a location where Windfall is situated.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — The Sunken Tower is located at the bottom of the Trackless Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Northstrider reappeared over an endless expanse of ocean in the Trackless Sea.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
